value.found_quote: Start with [`claude --safe-mode`](/en/cli-reference#cli-flags), which launches a session with all customizations disabled, including `CLAUDE.md`, skills, plugins, hooks, MCP servers, and custom commands and agents. Authentication, model selection, built-in tools, and permissions work normally. If the problem disappears in safe mode, one of those surfaces is the cause; use the targeted checks above to find which.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes `claude --safe-mode` as a feature that launches a session with all customizations disabled to isolate whether a problem is caused by user configuration. This directly substantiates the claim. The description on the page closely matches the claim: it disables customizations (CLAUDE.md, skills, plugins, hooks, MCP servers, and custom commands/agents) so users can determine if the problem is caused by their configuration. The feature appears to be generally available (active), annotated with a minimum version comment of v2.1.169.
